stemHtml: The region of the globe where the greatest number of tropical revolving storms occur is…

options.a: the South-western Indian Ocean, affecting Madagascar, Mauritius and the island of Reunion.
options.b: the Caribbean Sea, affecting the West Indies, Mexico and the south-east coastline of the USA.
options.c: the Northern Indian Ocean, affecting India, Sri Lanka and Bangladesh.
options.d: the North-west Pacific, affecting Japan, Taiwan, Korea and the Chinese coastline.
